items.title: New bill in California senate could turn your home battery into a moneymaker
items.summary: California senate bill 913 would allow utilities and grid operators to treat home backup batteries like real power plants, opening the door for programs that can pay homeowners to share excess energy capacity during peak demand. more…

items.title: World Monitor - Real-Time Global Intelligence Dashboard
items.summary: Tech World Monitor 글로벌 대시보드 기반 기술 동향 요약입니다. Real-time global intelligence dashboard with live news, markets, military tracking, infrastructure monitoring, and geopolitical data. OSINT in one view. 이번 수집은 해저 케이블, 기상, 경제 지표, 서비스 장애, 데이터센터, 자연재해 레이어를 중심으로 참고했습니다. 분석 기준 구간은 최근 7d입니다.

items.title: Researchers Uncover Pre-Stuxnet ‘fast16’ Malware Targeting Engineering Software
items.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new Lua-based malware created years before the notorious Stuxnet worm that aimed to sabotage Iran's nuclear program by destroying uranium enrichment centrifuges. According to a new report published by SentinelOne, the previously undocumented cyber sabotage framework dates back to 2005, primarily targeting high-precision calculation software to tamper
items.author: info@thehackernews.com (The Hacker News)
